title: selago abietina
intro: Selago abietina, also known as Mountain pride, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern Cape region of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of certain flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Selago abietina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
